---
title: "Publications"
description: "Selected recent OptoLAB publications and research outputs."
canonical-url: "https://optolab-unimore.github.io/publications.html"
bibliography: publications.bib
---

Selected recent outputs involving OptoLAB members. The links lead to DOI records or the UNIMORE institutional repository.

## 2026

- Flexible calibration method: Photometric and radiometric measurements with compact low-cost multi-channel sensors. [@besozzi2026calibration] [IRIS record](https://iris.unimore.it/handle/11380/1412808)
- Design and characterization of a portable fluorescence measuring system for on-site monitoring marine bio-constructors. [@cassanelli2026fluorescence] [IRIS record](https://iris.unimore.it/handle/11380/1405128)
- PopEYE: an infrared ocular image dataset. [@gibertoni2026popeye] [Dataset record](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18430186)

## 2025

- A simplified method for evaluating LiDAR optical safety. [@cattini2025lidar] [IRIS record](https://iris.unimore.it/handle/11380/1387908)
- Enhancing ophthalmic exams with real-time eye position monitoring. [@gibertoni2025optocheck] [IRIS record](https://iris.unimore.it/handle/11380/1386368)

## 2024

- Size-resolved concentration estimation of nano-/micro-plastics for different salinity with nanoelectrode arrays. [@goldoni2024microplastics] [IRIS record](https://iris.unimore.it/handle/11380/1364249)

## Earlier selected work

- Vision-based eye image classification for ophthalmic measurement systems. [@gibertoni2023classification] [IRIS record](https://iris.unimore.it/handle/11380/1294625)
